programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.sub-title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Legends Tournament, Part 1
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites eight chefs to compete in a five-part racecourse for a $30,000 grand prize; the bottom ranking chefs must create a second guilty pleasure dish to avoid elimination.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.sub-title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Legends Tournament, Part 2
programme.desc: Guy Fieri sends talented chefs running through the aisles of Flavortown Market for the chance to make some serious dough; they face real-world challenges as they compete to be the last chef standing in this high-stakes cooking competition.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.sub-title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Legends Tournament, Part 3
programme.desc: Guy Fieri pairs the remaining six DDD chefs into teams and gives each duo under $20 to create a classic food duo; the top two teams continue their race for the $30,000 grand prize, while the bottom duo faces off in a seafood dinner budget battle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.sub-title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Legends Tournament, Part 4
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges the five remaining DDD chefs to make a burger and side using only nine ingredients; the bottom two chefs must shop fast and furious for ingredients to make takeout noodles to earn the last spot in the finale worth $30,000.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.sub-title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Legends Tournament, Part 5: Finale
programme.desc: Guy Fieri asks the final four DDD chefs to make updated diner classics; the three best chefs must prepare a dinner of champions using one ingredient from every aisle of the store to win the Grand Champion Trophy and the $30,000 grand prize.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Say cheese! The reigning champion defends their title against chefs Jamie Tran and Isaac Toups as they prove to judges Jet Tila and Antonia Lofaso that they can handle the cheesy curveballs and dairy-driven twists of Guy Fieri's Flavortown restaurants.

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges the competitors to leave the plates behind and serve everything in a bowl; the returning champion takes on chefs Martel Stone and Evelyn Garcia to win over judges Antonia Lofaso and Aaron May in Flavortown's fiercest competition yet.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes the triumphant Great 8 back to the arena for the fiercest quarterfinals in Tournament of Champions history. In four sudden death battles, eight world-class chefs face an amped-up randomizer as the categories go international this round.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges the competitors to leave the plates behind and serve everything in a bowl; the returning champion takes on chefs Martel Stone and Evelyn Garcia to win over judges Antonia Lofaso and Aaron May in Flavortown's fiercest competition yet.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes the triumphant Great 8 back to the arena for the fiercest quarterfinals in Tournament of Champions history. In four sudden death battles, eight world-class chefs face an amped-up randomizer as the categories go international this round.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Say cheese! The reigning champion defends their title against chefs Jamie Tran and Isaac Toups as they prove to judges Jet Tila and Antonia Lofaso that they can handle the cheesy curveballs and dairy-driven twists of Guy Fieri's Flavortown restaurants.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy's letting four chefs choose between three different budgets over three rounds; they quickly realize it's much harder than it looks, with one budget allowing for only four dollars a plate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: BBQ Brawl
programme.desc: The modern grills and smokers have been replaced with Old West live-fire gear; team captains Bobby Flay, Maneet Chauhan and Antonia Lofaso lead the Brawlers as they rustle up breakfast and a hearty, cowboy-worthy feast.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: BBQ Brawl
programme.sub-title: Flay V. Chauhan V. Lofaso: To Meat ... or Not to Meat
programme.desc: The Brawlers step out of their comfort zone for a baking challenge; captains Bobby Flay, Maneet Chauhan and Antonia Lofaso need all hands on deck in a veggie-forward team brawl to prove these competitors don't need meat to bring the heat.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: This battle is all about indulging wholeheartedly in late-night cravings; in the first round, tacos and ramen in the basket force the chefs to make fusion plates; the entrée basket includes a very hot pepper and a beloved potato product.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four superhero chefs race to make mussels dishes in the appetizer round; the competitors' personalities and culinary points of view have a chance to shine in their skirt steak entrée plates.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: The chefs are eager to put their own mark on things by grabbing extra items for their appetizers; their pantry picks may not be smart choices; figuring out what to do with a leafy vegetable sucks up most of their time in the entrée round.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four chefs connected to the rich culinary history of Africa cook with passion in this special competition. Goat chops test the chefs' chops in the entrée round, and a final basket that skews more savory than sweet presents a challenge for the finalists.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: New York City chef Kelvin Fernandez already beat Bobby Flay with his legendary signature dish; Bobby invites him for a shot at the Titans, where judge Adrienne Cheatham must decide if Kelvin's strategy has payed off.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Chef Silvia Barban has one thing on her mind, and that's sweet revenge; Brooke Williamson has beaten Silvia in the past, and it's still on her mind! If she can handle the hurdles of Bobby Flay's Triple Threat kitchen, she just may taste it.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Latin American chef Adriana Urbina brings her Michelin background to take down Bobby Flay's Titans; after a surprise announcement, Adriana's strategy is to use ingredients the Titan has never used.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: The Titans get the shock of their lives when Bobby Flay's best friend, Iron Chef Michael Symon, enters the Triple Threat kitchen; friendship doesn't stop Bobby from making this a fair fight as Michael faces off with his Achilles' heel ingredient.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: New York City's small but mighty chef Deb Caplan takes on Beantown's Nicholas Lisotto; Scott Conant ("Chopped") teams up with actress and model Olivia Culpo to show Bobby Flay that he is not quite ready for his close-up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Buffalo chef Mike Andrzejewski and rural but refined chef Anthony Nelson arrive in the big city to duke it out; Food Network stars Eddie Jackson and Damaris Phillips send the winner into the ring with chef Flay.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Damaris Phillips and Amanda Freitag team up to take down their good friend, Bobby Flay; they bring in Japanese cuisine master Shota Nakajima and chef Jamie Gwen to dish up a mean victory.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: "The Kitchen" co-host Sunny Anderson and world traveler Andrew Zimmern join forces to beat chef Bobby Flay, handpicking Brooklyn's finest Jared Forman and Italian master chef Fabio Viviani to deliver the win.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Country music superstar Martina McBride and chef Alex Guarnaschelli jam with chefs Drew Erickson and Aristide Williams to tune Bobby Flay up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Chefs Anne Burrell and Eddie Jackson bring the noise as chefs Jessica Yarr and Matthew Zafrir bring the flavor to dump Bobby Flay in a pierogi battle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Fashion icon Carson Kressley and pastry chef Stephanie Boswell zhuzh up chefs Chris Infinger and Kevin Lee and prepare them for victory over Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson and Scott Conant team up with chefs Maryam Ghaznavi and Deepak Kaul to school Bobby Flay in new worlds of flavor.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Josh Capon and Today's Dylan Dreyer fire up Bobby Flay's grill with pitmasters Matt Abdoo and Dominique Leach.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson and TV host Nina Parker conspire with chefs John Cleveland and Michael Fiorelli to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Stage and screen actor Josh Gad duets with Damaris Phillips to turn out Bobby Flay's lights while preparing chefs Ciaran McGoldrick and Josh Mouzakes for their big debut.

programme.desc: Brooke Williamson and actor Randall Park recruit chefs Marcos Spaziani and Richard Van Lê to teach Bobby Flay a thing or two about a tricky signature dish.

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay offers his support to The Verdict, a restaurant known for serving traditional New Orleans cuisine with a modern and trendy twist.

programme.desc: A well-liked, retired couple ask Ramsay to help their son, who has taken over their restaurant, Nino's, in Long Beach, Calif.

programme.desc: Katie Lee Biegel and actor Nicholas Braun taunt Bobby Flay with a couple of young chefs, Hanna Haar and Peter McQuaid, who are gunning for the win.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions
programme.sub-title: Leave It All on the Floor
programme.desc: In the final four battles of the first round, Guy Fieri welcomes Chopped judge Amanda Freitag to face off against qualifier winner Carlos Anthony; in the last battle of the round, qualifier winner David Viana takes on former finalist Tobias Dorzon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the seven remaining chefs to find inspiration in grab-and-go gas station snacks; the bakers create their own interpretation of a classic dessert, like an opera cake or a Sachertorte, for judges Duff Goldman and Zac Young.

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer tasks the bakers with creating a visually stunning chocolate sculptural piece along with a complementary baked element; chocolatier Amaury Guichon joins Duff Goldman to judge the chefs' technical precision and creative storytelling.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ramsay travels to Woodland Park, Colo., to save Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant saddled with tension between the owner and her staff, and problems with the food, atmosphere and service.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ramsay travels to Woodland Park, Colo., to save Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant saddled with tension between the owner and her staff, and problems with the food, atmosphere and service.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ramsay helps the owners of Old Neighborhood in Arvada, Colo., transform their restaurant.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: Gordon steps in to help transform Diwan, an established Indian restaurant that is also running a Mexican restaurant out of the same kitchen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hittin' up joints crushin' all kinds of flavor; there's a Malaysian oasis in Cincinnati and a Salvadorian spot in Port Chester, N.Y., each serving their real deal cultural specialties; a bus in Omaha goes Detroit-style with their pizza.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Richmond is a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavor; in Reno is a sandwich spot going loco with the bird and putting a unique twist on the breakfast burrito.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
